name: MediaProcessInput
title: MediaProcessInput
syntax: long MediaProcessInput(dword multiplexerHandle, dword inputStreamIndex, int64 timestamp, byte buffer[], dword length)
description: Delivers data to an input stream on this multiplexer.

parameters.name: multiplexerHandle
parameters.description: The multiplexer handle returned previously by a call to MediaCreateMultiplexer.

parameters.name: inputStreamIndex
parameters.description: The index of the input stream the media type should be set for. Currently only 1 input stream per multiplex stream is supported, so set this parameter to 0.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The (presentation) timestamp in nanoseconds. This time is relative to the start of the stream (not the absolute gPTP time).

parameters.name: buffer
parameters.description: The sample data for the input stream that should be processed.

parameters.name: length
parameters.description: The length of the sample data in the buffer array in bytes.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
